2606.29064.title: Fairness Attacks on Recommender Systems
2606.29064.paper_summary: The unfairness of recommender systems has become a topic of concern due to its significant social and ethical implications. Although existing works have shown the effectiveness of attacks on the performance of recommender systems (e.g., promotion and demotion attack), the study of fairness attacks on recommender systems remains largely under-explored. To this end, we propose a novel structure-aware reinforcement learning-based fairness attack method designed to exacerbate the unfairness of target recommender systems. Specifically, we first employ a graph-based structure encoder to model the structural dependencies among the generated fake user-item interactions and the original user-item interactions. Then, we model the sequential dependency of the injected fake items using a recurrent neural network. Based on the learned structure-aware and sequence-aware representations of the fake user and item, the item selection policy attentively decides the next injected fake item. Since the target recommender system may employ fairness-aware training and leverage the user's sensitive attribute information, such as gender, we further designed a gender selection policy to decide the gender of the entire fake user profile. Both the item selection and gender selection policy are learned jointly in our proposed method. Finally, experimental results on four types of target recommendation models and two real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed attack method in exacerbating the unfairness of recommender systems.
2606.29064.paper_summary_zh: 推薦系統的不公平性已成為一個令人關注的話題，因為它具有重大的社會和倫理影響。儘管現有的研究已顯示攻擊推薦系統性能的有效性（例如，促進和降級攻擊），但對推薦系統公平性攻擊的研究仍然在很大程度上未被深入探討。為此，我們提出了一種新穎的基於結構感知強化學習的公平性攻擊方法，旨在加劇目標推薦系統的不公平性。具體而言，我們首先使用基於圖的結構編碼器來建模生成的假用戶-物品互動與原始用戶-物品互動之間的結構依賴性。然後，我們使用遞歸神經網絡來建模注入的假物品的序列依賴性。基於學習到的結構感知和序列感知的假用戶和物品表示，物品選擇策略專注於決定下一個注入的假物品。由於目標推薦系統可能採用公平性感知的訓練並利用用戶的敏感屬性信息，例如性別，我們進一步設計了一個性別選擇策略來決定整個假用戶檔案的性別。物品選擇和性別選擇策略在我們提出的方法中是共同學習的。最後，對四種類型的目標推薦模型和兩個現實世界數據集的實驗結果證明了所提出的攻擊方法在加劇推薦系統不公平性方面的有效性。
2606.29064.author: Yanan Wang et.al.
